input.instructions:
Solve atlas-derived-A8-thermal-time-hypothesis-fails-for-excited-states: Determine if modular flow yields correct time evolution for excited quantum states.

1. Correct conclusion
2. Scaling law identification
3. Preparation-history interpretation

JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

variables.selected_prompt_text:

}
